title: cinnastrum poiforme
intro: Cinnastrum poiforme, also known as Pouteria sapota, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae, native to Central and South America. Cinnastrum poiforme has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnastrum poiforme include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Cinnastrum poiforme can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
